title: Thrikkakara Temple
tagline: Thrikkakara Temple — spiritual town of Kerala

overview.short: Thrikkakara Vamanamoorthy Temple is one of the major Hindu temples in India dedicated to Vamana, a form of the god Vishnu.
overview.description: Thrikkakara Vamanamoorthy Temple is one of the major Hindu temples in India dedicated to Vamana, a form of the god Vishnu. It is situated in Thrikkakara, Kochi in the state of Kerala, India. The temple is around two millennia old and is also listed as one of the 108 Divya Desams (divine places). The main temple festival is during the Onam season, which falls on the month of August or September and is the most important event of the religious calendar here.

howToReach.roadNote: Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

topPlaces.name: Thrikkakkara
topPlaces.description: Thrikkakara (Malayalam pronunciation: [t̪r̥ik:aːkaɾa]) is major industrial and residential region in the city of Kochi in Kerala, India. It is located 6.6 km (4.1 mi) east of the Kochi city centre.

topPlaces.name: Thrikkakara North
topPlaces.description: Thrikkakara North (Village) is a village in Ernakulam district in the state of Kerala, India. It is part of Thrikkakara Municipality.

topPlaces.name: Naval Physical and Oceanographic Laboratory
topPlaces.description: The Naval Physical and Oceanographic Laboratory or NPOL is a laboratory of the Defence Research and Development Organisation (DRDO), under the Ministry of Defence, India. It is situated in Thrikkakara, Kochi, Kerala.

topPlaces.name: Changampuzha Nagar
topPlaces.description: Changampuzha Nagar is a prominent and planned residential area in Kalamassery in the city of Kochi, Kerala, India. The Residential area lies between Kalamassery municipal town hall and Pathadippalam near the National Highway 544 and is the major residential area in Kalamassery and Ernakulam.

topPlaces.name: St. Joseph's of the Woods EMHS
topPlaces.description: St. Joseph's of the Woods English-Medium Higher Secondary School is a Catholic Co-Educational higher secondary school in Thrikkakkara (Kalamassery), Kochi in the Indian state of Kerala.

image.alt: St. Joseph's of the Woods EMHS

topPlaces.name: Edathala
topPlaces.description: Edathala is a gram panchayat near Aluva town. It is also a village in Aluva taluk of Ernakulam district, in the state of Kerala, India.

topPlaces.name: Bhavan's Varuna Vidyalaya
topPlaces.description: Bhavan's Varuna Vidyalaya is a senior secondary school situated at Thrikkakara, in the city of Kochi, India. The school is a joint venture of the Bharatiya Vidya Bhavan and Naval Physical and Oceanographic Laboratory (NPOL).

topPlaces.name: Pathadipalam metro station
topPlaces.description: Pathadipalam is a station of Kochi Metro.The station is located between Cochin University and Edapally. It was inaugurated by the Prime Minister of India Narendra Modi on 17 June and opened for public on 19 June 2017 as a part of the first stretch of the metro system, between Aluva and Palarivattom.

The Naval Physical and Oceanographic Laboratory or NPOL is a laboratory of the Defence Research and Development Organisation (DRDO), under the Ministry of Defence, India. It is situated in Thrikkakara, Kochi, Kerala.

Changampuzha Nagar is a prominent and planned residential area in Kalamassery in the city of Kochi, Kerala, India. The Residential area lies between Kalamassery municipal town hall and Pathadippalam near the National Highway 544 and is the major residential area in Kalamassery and Ernakulam.

Pathadipalam is a station of Kochi Metro.The station is located between Cochin University and Edapally. faq.q: What is the best time to visit Thrikkakara Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Thrikkakara Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Thrikkakara Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Cochin International Airport, Kochi (15 km) and the nearest railway station is Ernakulam Junction (Kochi) (9 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Thrikkakara Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Thrikkakara Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Thrikkakara Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Thrikkakara Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Thrikkakara Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Thrikkakkara, Thrikkakara North, Naval Physical and Oceanographic Laboratory, Changampuzha Nagar, St. Joseph's of the Woods EMHS.
